mapper.insert: INSERT INTO price_alert (user_id, product_id, target_price, notified) VALUES (#{userId}, #{productId}, #{targetPrice}, #{notified}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE target_price = #{targetPrice}, notified = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM price_alert WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.update: UPDATE price_alert SET notified = #{notified} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM price_alert WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND product_id = #{productId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM price_alert WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM price_alert WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND notified = 0 AND target_price >= #{currentPrice}
